items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 eastbound between 5.9 miles east of Exit 123: PA 970 NORTH - SHAWVILLE and 5.2 miles west of Exit 133: PA 53 - KYLERTOWN/PHILIPSBURG. There is a lane restriction.
